The University of Glasgow uses cookies for analytics. Find out more about our Privacy policy.

We use cookies

Necessary cookies

Necessary cookies enable core functionality. The website cannot function properly without these cookies, and can only be disabled by changing your browser preferences.

Analytics cookies

Analytical cookies help us improve our website. We use Google Analytics. All data is anonymised.

ON OFF

Clarity

Clarity helps us to understand our users’ behaviour by visually representing their clicks, taps and scrolling. All data is anonymised.

ON OFF

Privacy policy

Academic Policy & Governance

  • Session Dates
  • Session 2025-26

Standard Dates for Academic Session 2025-26

The Academic Year shall run from 15 September 2025 until 11 September 2026

Teaching shall begin on 22 September 2025

2025 September Monday 15 Start of academic year / Orientation  
    Monday 22 Start of Semester 1 teaching  
  December Monday 1 Start of graduation period  
    Friday 5 End of Semester 1 teaching  
    Monday 8 Start of revision and examination period  
    Friday 19 End of revision and examination period / end of Semester 1  
    Monday 22  

Winter Vacation starts
2026 January Friday 9   Winter Vacation ends
    Monday 12 Start of Semester 2 teaching  
  March Friday 27 End of Semester 2 teaching  
    Monday 30   Spring Vacation starts
  April Friday 17   Spring Vacation ends
    Monday 20 Start of revision period  
    Monday 27 Start of examination period  
  May Monday 4   May Day Holiday
    Friday 22 End of examination period  
    Monday 25   Spring Bank Holiday
    Friday 29 End of Semester 2  
  June Wednesday 24 Start of graduation period  
  July Monday 20   Fair Monday Holiday
    Monday 27 Start of examination period  
  August  Friday 14 End of examination period  
  September Friday 11 End of Academic Year
